name: Cross-Strategy Overlap Detection
description: Daily (11:30 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Queries Neo4j to find tickers appearing on multiple strategy watchlists. Stocks on 2+ watchlists are high-conviction picks. Creates alerts and stores overlap data for the scorecard generator.

parameters.content:
## Cross-Strategy Overlap Detection

Required: neo4j, postgresApi
Finds tickers on 2+ watchlists = high conviction
Reads FROM Neo4j graph relationships

parameters.query: MATCH (c:Company)-[r:IN_WATCHLIST]->(w:Watchlist) WITH c.ticker AS ticker, c.name AS company_name, collect(w.name) AS strategies, collect(r.score) AS scores, count(w) AS watchlist_count WHERE watchlist_count >= 2 RETURN ticker, company_name, strategies, scores, watchlist_count ORDER BY watchlist_count DESC, ticker

INSERT INTO alerts (ticker, alert_type, strategy, message, severity, metadata) SELECT '{{$json.ticker}}', 'cross_strategy_overlap', 'multi', '{{$json.company_name}} ({{$json.ticker}}) appears on {{$json.watchlist_count}} watchlists: {{$json.strategies}}. High-conviction pick.', 'warning', '{"strategies": {{JSON.stringify($json.strategies)}}, "count": {{$json.watchlist_count}}}' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alerts WHERE ticker='{{$json.ticker}}' AND alert_type='cross_strategy_overlap' AND triggered_at::date=CURRENT_DATE);

INSERT INTO ai_agent_reports (agent_name, report_date, report_type, summary, findings, created_at) VALUES ('overlap_detector', CURRENT_DATE, 'cross_strategy_overlap', 'Found {{$json.ticker}} on {{$json.watchlist_count}} watchlists: {{$json.strategies}}', '{"ticker": "{{$json.ticker}}", "strategies": {{JSON.stringify($json.strategies)}}, "count": {{$json.watchlist_count}}}', NOW());
